landing.title: Turn your thoughts into secure, organized notes and faster.
landing.subtitle: The #1 secure note-taking app.
landing.description: Manage your notes effortlessly and securely. Just type, save, and access them from anywhere with robust encryption and seamless synchronization.
landing.brandsTitle: More reasons companies around the world choose us

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: We would love to hear from you! If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to reach out to us.
contact.name: Name

about.title: About Us
about.intro: Welcome to SecureNote, your trusted companion for secure and private note-taking. We believe in providing a safe space where your thoughts and ideas are protected with the highest level of security. Our mission is to ensure that your notes are always accessible to you and only you. With state-of-the-art encryption and user-friendly features, SecureNote is designed to keep your information confidential and secure.
about.point1: Add an extra layer of security with two-factor authentication.
about.point2: Your notes are encrypted from the moment you create them.
about.point3: Access your notes from anywhere with the assurance that they are securely stored.
about.point4: Our app is designed to be intuitive and easy to use.

notFound.title: Something is missing.
notFound.description: Sorry, we cannot find that page. You will find lots to explore on the home page.

toast.forgotError: Error sending password reset email. Please try again.
toast.resetSuccess: Password reset successful! You can now log in.
toast.resetError: Error resetting password. Please try again.
